text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to see and understand the world through images and videos. Two common tasks in computer vision are image recognition and object detection. Image recognition identifies what is in an image, such as a cat or a tree, while object detection not only recognizes objects but also finds their exact position. This technology has many real-world applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision helps the vehicle recognize roads, traffic signs, and other cars to make driving decisions. Other uses include security systems and medical imaging.
